compliance.disclaimerShort: Funding options vary by profile. Not a lender. Terms depend on underwriting.

seo.title: Gig Worker Funding (2026): Fast Options for Irregular Income
seo.description: Compare fast funding paths for gig workers, freelancers, and creators—based on deposits, not pay stubs. Apply, prep, or get a straight answer.

hero.h1: Gig Worker & Creator Funding (2026): Fast Options for Irregular Income
hero.subhead: Banks love pay stubs. You have deposits. This page shows funding lanes that fit gig workers and creators—based on bank activity, not paperwork cosplay.
bullets: Fast paths: same-day to 72-hour options when you qualify
Deposit-first underwriting: bank activity matters more than perfect forms
Straight answer policy: Apply, Prep, or No (with receipts)

notFor: brand-new bank account with no history

options.title: Instant Deposit-Based Advance
options.oneLiner: When you need money like you need oxygen—fast.

options.title: Revenue-Based Funding (RBF)
options.oneLiner: Funding that cares about cashflow patterns, not résumés.
watchOuts: repayment can pinch if deposits dip

options.title: Merchant Cash Advance (MCA)
options.oneLiner: Fast and available—use it like a tool, not a lifestyle.

paths.title: Need funding in 24–72 hours
paths.summary: Go Instant → RBF → MCA depending on deposits/card volume.

paths.title: Want repeatable access (not panic-funding)
paths.summary: Explore LOC + credit-based lanes for stability and better terms.

paths.title: Not ready yet (but want to be)
paths.summary: Run the 7–14 day prep plan to stop denial loops.

recommendedSpokes.title: Instant Funding for Gig Workers (2026): Up to $20K Fast
No Tax Returns? Here’s What Lenders Use Instead

faqs.q: Can gig workers get loans without tax returns?
faqs.a: Yes. Many funding options use bank statements, deposits, and revenue patterns instead of tax returns.

faqs.q: What’s the fastest funding option for gig workers?
faqs.a: Deposit-based advances and some revenue-based options can fund same-day to 72 hours if your banking activity supports it.

seo.title: Material Financing for Electricians Waiting on Net-30 Checks
seo.description: Fast capital options for electricians covering materials, payroll gaps, and job growth—based on deposits and activity.

hero.h1: Material Financing for Electricians Waiting on Net-30 Checks
hero.subhead: Your supplier wants money today. Your client pays next month. This page covers funding lanes built for that exact pain.
bullets: Cover materials and payroll gaps without begging a bank
Funding lanes that respect real-world contractor cashflow
